links.title: Subglacial lakes boundaries and elevation time series
Subglacial lakes boundaries and elevation time series

data.title: Antarctic active subglacial lake boundaries
data.description: GeoParquet table of Antarctic active subglacial lake boundary polygons derived from CryoSat-2 surface elevation change and post-processed from Wilson et al. (2025). Each row represents a delineated lake activity boundary for a specific lake, time period, and elevation-change contour threshold.

parquet:columns.name: record_id
parquet:columns.description: Unique identifier for a subglacial lake boundary record, encoding lake name, activity period, and contour threshold.

parquet:columns.name: name
parquet:columns.description: Name or inventory label of the Antarctic subglacial lake.

parquet:columns.name: new_sgl_glake
parquet:columns.description: Flag indicating whether the lake was newly identified in Wilson et al. (2025).

parquet:columns.name: start_date
parquet:columns.description: Start date of the elevation-change period used for boundary delineation.

parquet:columns.name: end_date
parquet:columns.description: End date of the elevation-change period used for boundary delineation.

parquet:columns.name: contour_m_yr
parquet:columns.description: Elevation-change rate contour used to delineate the lake activity boundary.

parquet:columns.name: geometry
parquet:columns.description: Polygon geometry representing the subglacial lake activity boundary.
